messages.author: LSdigi (SE19 6DBI Omni)
messages.text: Hey guys, are there any plans for expanding the neighbours list on repeaters to more than 50? My node is in a key location but the neighbours get truncated so never get a full picture of the 0hop nodes around me. Thanks
messages.content_html: Hey guys, are there any plans for expanding the neighbours list on repeaters to more than 50? My node is in a key location but the neighbours get truncated so never get a full picture of the 0hop nodes around me. Thanks

messages.author: recrof
messages.text: just change MAX_NEIGHBOURS to any value you want and build the firmware
messages.content_html: just change MAX_NEIGHBOURS to any value you want and build the firmware

messages.author: LSdigi (SE19 6DBI Omni)
messages.text: Thanks guys. Is there a downside to having more than 50 neighbours?
messages.content_html: Thanks guys. Is there a downside to having more than 50 neighbours?

messages.author: recrof
messages.text: yes.. it takes up space in ram. that's why we set the limit to 50. but if you use board with lot of ram(like esp32s3), set it to 100, no problem
messages.content_html: yes.. it takes up space in ram. that's why we set the limit to 50. but if you use board with lot of ram(like esp32s3), set it to 100, no problem
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
LSdigi (SE19 6DBI Omni)
Thanks guys. Is there a downside to having more than 50 neighbours?
